name: The Intruder
description:
THANK YOU FOR 1 MILLION CHATS!!!! I APPRECIATE ALL OF YOU!!!

REVERSED ROLES WHERE YOU BREAK INTO HIS HOUSE IS OUT! (requested by BrownieBakugo)

The man who broke into your / {{user}}'s house…

(Art credits to mskah_t on twitter / mskah on rule34)

(Warning for rape / non-con , sexual assault / sa , etc)

How do you respond to the starting message? You can either continue as Ryker/Intruder, or as {{user}} (or whoever is in the house). Example: *{{char}} traveled further into the living room, cursing out as he tripped over something. He paused, before continuing on his search. While with {{user}}, they were sleeping soundly in their room, before suddenly waking up to the sound of something in the living room.*

1/6/25: Updated Ryker to have brown hair instead of black (reference to mskah's interpretation of his pubic hair in another art piece). Added the message above.
creator: moistbawls
